_publications._publicationTitle: Ex vivo to in vivo model of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for precision oncology.

_contextSnippet: WU-225 was the most responsive to trabectedin and mirdametinib...dramatic growth inhibition was observed with trabectedin single agent...trabectedin plus olaparib combination elicited unacceptable toxicity
details: Most responsive to trabectedin and mirdametinib. Dramatic growth inhibition was observed with trabectedin single agent, enhanced slightly with addition of mirdametinib. Trabectedin plus olaparib combination elicited unacceptable toxicity and treatment lasted only 14 days
